sourceMovie.title: Ma
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Ma works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: 30 Days of Night
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Ma clicked for you, 30 Days of Night (2007) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Ma?
faq.answer: Try 30 Days of Night, The Last House on the Left, Psycho II—each shares DNA with Ma while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Ma?
faq.answer: Ma (2019) is best described as Horror, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Ma part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Ma Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
